news.t: How to tell if it is worth avoiding taxes with a municipal bond ETF

overview.description: The iShares New York Muni Bond ETF (NYF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE AMT-Free New York Municipal index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of investment-grade debt issued by New York governments and agencies whose interest is exempt from US and New York tax. NYF was launched on Oct 4, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: How to tell if it is worth avoiding taxes with a municipal bond ETF
data.text: As interest rates have risen, investors have been attracted to bank certificates of deposits and short-term U.S. Treasury securities because they have been able to take very little risk to receive yie...
